description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image globally but overrides it with ruby:latest for the production job. Define a single stage called production. Add a production job of type deploy that only runs on the master branch, executes the exact commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=learncodeweb --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY to deploy the app to Heroku, and does not define any caches or artifacts.
